{{Infobox location
| name = Elder Whisper's tower
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Elder Whisper]]'s tower is a tall structure located in [[Sacred Valley]] that serves as the residence for [[Elder Whisper]], an ancient fox and the original master of the [[Path of the White Fox]]. The building is characterized by its height, standing as a prominent landmark that can be seen from a distance. It consists of only two rooms—one at the base and one at the summit—connected by a long, repetitive spiral staircase containing thousands of steps. The tower's base is protected by a closed circle of engraved script on the floor, which prevents [[Elder Whisper]] from leaving the premises except during formal clan occasions. While the tower was once a significant part of the [[Wei clan]]'s territory, it was eventually destroyed when its top half was toppled and shattered.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Elder Whisper's tower]] consists of a bottom room, a top room, and a spiraling staircase with thousands of steps.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3">''Unsouled'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Elder Whisper's tower]] has a line of script engraved in the floor to prevent him from leaping out.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3" />}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Elder Whisper's tower]] is located in [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Elder Whisper]]’s tower is as tall as [[Lindon]] remembers it.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Elder Whisper]] has a tower.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Windfall]] is next to the ruins of [[Elder Whisper]]’s tower.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
